title: AIShield
description: AIShield secures agentic AI by delivering autonomous agent discovery, runtime guardrails, tool-level enforcement, supply-chain validation, and governance controls—enabling enterprises to deploy self-executing AI systems with visibility, risk containment, and regulatory confidence.

items: Enforce role- & task-based access policies across agent populations & their tool access.
Align control evidence with frameworks like EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, & ISO/IEC 42001.
Automate goal alignment audits, including adversarial review of long-term agent memory.
